members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: A white or light-colored fireplace mantel with decorative molding set into the right wall. Mantel shelf visible with small items; fireplace opening below not dominant in image but mantel contrasts with beige wall.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: To the right of the recliner and beneath the wall-mounted TV
